sections.paragraph:
Original: רמליהוּ

Transliteration: remalyâhû

Phonetic: rem-al-yaw'-hoo

BDB Definition:

Remaliah = "protected by Jehovah"
  1. father of king Pekah of the northern kingdom of Israel

Origin: from an unused root and H3050 (perhaps meaning to deck)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
